duas.title: Isteghasa (seeking aid) - Imam Mahdi (atfs)
duas.description:
Allamah Majlisi (r.a.) narrates from the author of Qabs al-Misbaah who writes, ‘I heard Shaykh Abu Abdillah al-Husain Ibn al-Hasan Ibn Babwayh (r.a.)(Shaykh al-Saduq (a.r.)) at Rayy near tehran in the year 440 A.H. narrate from his uncle Abu Ja’far Muhammad Ibn Ali Ibn Babwayh (r.a.)3, ‘One of my teachers from Qum reported, “I was afflicted with a terrible tragedy which made my condition miserable but I felt uncomfortable to let anybody else know about it from my family or friends.
I slept in this state of grief when I dreamt that a handsome man, well dressed and perfumed. His traits were like some of our teachers from Qum from whom I used to study.
I said to myself, ‘Till when will I endure my hardships and afflictions and not let anyone from my brothers know about it? This man is from my teachers and I should mention my problem to him. Perhaps he may solve it for me.
He initiated the conversation with me saying, ‘Return to your path towards Allah, the High, seek help from Saaheb al-Zaman (a.t.f.s.) and take him as your refuge. For surely, he is the best of helpers and a protection for his believing friends.’
Thereafter, he caught his right hand and said, ‘See him, salute him and ask him to intercede on your behalf from Allah, the High, in the fulfillment of your needs.’
I said, ‘Teach me how I should say it because my grief has made me forget all the Ziyarat and Supplications.
He heaved a deep sigh and said, ‘There is no power or strength but through Allah.’ Then he touched my chest with his hand and remarked, ‘Allah will suffice for you and no evil will befall you. Purify yourself and perform two units of prayers. Then stand up, facing the Qiblah, beneath the sky and say the dua.
duas.arabic:
سَلاَمُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْكَامِلُ ٱلتَّامُّ
ٱلشَّامِلُ ٱلْعَامُّ
وَصَلَوَاتُهُ ٱلدَّائِمَةُ
وَبَرَكَاتُهُ ٱلْقَائِمَةُ ٱلتَّامَّةُ
عَلَىٰ حُجَّةِ ٱللَّهِ
وَوَلِيِّهِ فِي ارْضِهِ وَبِلادِهِ
وَخَلِيفَتِهِ عَلَىٰ خَلْقِهِ وَعِبَادِهِ
وَسُلالَةِ ٱلنُّبُوَّةِ
وَبَقِيَّةِ ٱلْعِتْرَةِ وَٱلصَّفْوَةِ
صَاحِبِ ٱلزَّمَانِ
وَمُظْهِرِ ٱلإِيـمَانِ
وَمُلَقِّنِ احْكَامِ ٱلْقُرْآنِ
وَمُطَهِّرِ ٱلارْضِ
وَنَاشِرِ ٱلْعَدْلِ فِي ٱلطُّولِ وَٱلْعَرْضِ
وَٱلْحُجَّةِ ٱلْقَائِمِ ٱلْمَهْدِيِّ
ٱلإِمَامِ ٱلْمُنْتَظَرِ ٱلْمَرْضِيِّ
وَٱبْنِ ٱلائِمَّةِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
ٱلْوَصِيِّ ٱبْنِ ٱلاوْصِيَاءِ ٱلْمَرْضِيِّينَ
ٱلْهَادِي ٱلْمَعْصُومِ
ٱبْنِ ٱلائِمَّةِ ٱلْهُدَاةِ ٱلْمَعْصُومِينَ
السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُعِزَّ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٱلْمُسْتَضْعَفِينَ
السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُذِلَّ ٱلْكَافِرِينَ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ يَا صَاحِبَ ٱلزَّمَانِ
السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ امِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
السّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلائِمَّةِ ٱلْحُجَجِ ٱلْمَعْصُومِينَ
وَٱلإِمَامُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْخَلْقِ اجْمَعِينَ
السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ
سَلامَ مُخْلِصٍ لَكَ فِي ٱلْوِلايَةِ
اشْهَدُ انَّكَ ٱلإِمَامُ ٱلْمَهْدِيُّ قَوْلاً وَفِعْلاً
وَانْتَ ٱلَّذِي تَمْلَا ٱلارْضَ قِسْطاً وَعَدْلاً
بَعْدَ مَا مُلِئَتْ ظُلْماً وَجَوْراً
فَعَجَّلَ ٱللَّهُ فَرَجَكَ
وَسَهَّلَ مَخْرَجَكَ
وَقَرَّبَ زَمَانَكَ
وَكَثَّرَ انْصَارَكَ وَاعْوَانَكَ
وَانْجَزَ لَكَ مَا وَعَدَكَ
فَهُوَ اصْدَقُ ٱلْقَائِلِينَ:
(وَنُرِيدُ انْ نَمُنَّ عَلَىٰ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسْتُضْعِفُوا فِي ٱلارْضِ
وَنَجْعَلَهُمْ ائِمَّةً وَنَجْعَلَهُمُ ٱلْوَارِثِينَ)
يَا مَوْلايَ يَا صَاحِبَ ٱلزَّمَانِ
يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
حَاجَتِي…
فَٱشْفَعْ لِي فِي نَجَاحِهَا
فَقَدْ تَوَجَّهْتُ إِلَيْكَ بِحَاجَتِي
لِعِلْمِي انَّ لَكَ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ شَفَاعَةً مَقْبُولَةً
وَمَقَاماً مَحْمُوداً
فَبِحَقِّ مَنِ ٱخْتَصَّكُمْ بِامْرِهِ
وَٱرْتَضَاكُمْ لِسِرِّهِ
وَبِٱلشَّانِ ٱلَّذِي لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَهُ
سَلِ ٱللَّهَ تَعَالَىٰ فِي نُجْحِ طَلِبَتِي
وَإِجَابَةِ دَعْوَتِي
وَكَشْفِ كُرْبَتِي
duas.transliteration:
salamu allahi alkamilu alttammu

alshshamilu al`ammu

wa salawatuhu aldda'imatu

wa barakatuhu alqa'imatu alttammatu

`ala hujjati allahi

wa waliyyihi fi ardihi wa biladihi

wa khalifatihi `ala khalqihi wa `ibadihi

wa sulalati alnnubuwwati

wa baqiyyati al`itrati walssafwati

sahibi alzzamani

wa muzhiri al-imani

wa mulaqqini ahkami alqur'ani

wa mutahhiri al-ardi

wa nashiri al`adli fi alttuli wal`ardi

walhujjati alqa'imi almahdiyyi

al-imami almuntazari almardiyyi

wabni al-a'immati alttahirina

alwasiyyi ibni al-awsiya'i almardiyyina

alhadi alma`sumi

ibni al-a'immati alhudati alma`sumina

alssalamu `alayka ya mu`izza almu'minina almustad`afina

alssalamu `alayka ya mudhilla alkafirina almutakabbirina alzzalimina

alssalamu `alayka ya mawlaya ya sahiba alzzamani

alssalamu `alayka yabna rasuli allahi

alssalamu `alayka yabna amiri almu'minina

alssalamu `alayka yabna fatimata alzzahra'i

sayyidati nisa'i al`alamina

alssalamu `alayka yabna al-a'immati alhujaji alma`sumina

wal-imamu `ala alkhalqi ajma`ina

alssalamu `alayka ya mawlaya

salama mukhlisin laka fi alwilayati

ash-hadu annaka al-imamu almahdiyyu qawlan wa fi`lan

wa anta alladhi tamla'u al-arda qistan wa `adlan

ba`dama muli'at zulman wa jawran

fa`ajjala allahu farajaka

wa sahhala makhrajaka

wa qarraba zamanaka

wa kaththara ansaraka wa a`wanaka

wa anjaza laka ma wa `adaka

fahuwa asdaqu alqa'ilina

wa nuridu an namunna `ala alladhina istud`ifu fi al-ardi

wa naj`alahum a'immatan wa naj`alahumu alwarithina

ya mawlaya ya sahiba alzzamani

yabna rasuli allahi

hajati…


fashfa` li fi najahiha

faqad tawajjahtu ilayka bihajati

li`ilmi anna laka `inda allahi shafa`atan maqbulatan

wa maqaman mahmudan

fabihaqqi man ikhtassakum bi-amrihi

wartadakum lisirrihi

wa bilshsha'ni alladhi lakum `inda allahi baynakum wa baynahu

sal(i) allaha ta`ala fi nujhi talibati

wa ijabati da`wati

wa kashfi kurbati

You may then ask for whatever you want, and it will be settled for you, by Allah’s permission.
duas.translation:
Peace of Allah—perfect, complete,
comprehensive, and thorough;
and His endless benedictions
and His everlasting, perfect blessings
be upon the Argument of Allah,
His representative in His lands and realm,
His viceroy among His creatures and servants,
the offspring of Prophethood,
the completion of the (Holy) Progeny and the Choice Ones,
the Patron of the Age,
the demonstrator of the (true) faith,
the teacher of the laws of the Qur’an,
the purger of the earth,
the spreader of justice all over the earth,
the Argument (al-Hujjah), the Riser (al-Qa’im), the Well-guided (al-Mahdi),
the Leader, the Awaited, the Pleased,
the descendant of the Infallible Imams,
the Successor, the son of the Pleased Successors (of the Prophets),
the Guide, the Immaculate,
and the son of the Imams—the guides and immaculate.
Peace be upon you, O grantor of dignity to the oppressed and faithful ones.
Peace be upon you, O humiliator of the arrogant and oppressing unbelievers.
Peace be upon you, O my master, the Patron of the Age.
Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.
Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Believers.
Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the Luminous
and the Doyenne of the women of the world.
Peace be upon you, O son of the Imams—the arguments (of Allah) and Immaculate
and the leader of all creatures.
Peace be upon you, O my master
addressed by him who is loyal to your (divinely commissioned) leadership.
I bear witness that you are the well-guided Imam in word and deed,
it is you who shall fill the earth with justice and impartiality
after it will be filled with wrong and partiality.
So, may Allah hasten your reappearance,
make easy your advent,
make nearer the time of your coming,
increase the number of your supporters and backers,
and fulfill for you all that which He has promised you.
He is surely the most truthful of all those who can speak (and He has said):
“We desired to bestow a favor upon those who were deemed weak in the land,
make them the Imams, and make them the heirs.”
O my master! O Patron of the Age!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
My request is...
Mention your need and then go on saying:
So, intercede for me so that it will be settled,
for I am turning my face towards you for settling my request,
since I know for sure that you enjoy with Allah admissible word of intercession,
and praiseworthy standing.
So, I ask you in the name of Him Who granted you (i.e. the Ahl al-Bayt) exclusively the right of representing Him,
and admitted you all to keep His secrets,
and I ask you in the name of the standing that you exclusively enjoy with Allah,
to ask Allah, the Exalted, to render successful my request,
to answer my prayer,
and to relieve my grief.

segments.translation: Peace of Allah—perfect, complete,
comprehensive, and thorough;
and His endless benedictions
and His everlasting, perfect blessings
be upon the Argument of Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa waliyyihi fi ardihi wa biladihi
segments.translation: His representative in His lands and realm,
His viceroy among His creatures and servants,
the offspring of Prophethood,
the completion of the (Holy) Progeny and the Choice Ones,
the Patron of the Age,
the demonstrator of the (true) faith,
the teacher of the laws of the Qur’an,
the purger of the earth,

segments.transliteration: wa nashiri al`adli fi alttuli wal`ardi
segments.translation: the spreader of justice all over the earth,
the Argument (al-Hujjah), the Riser (al-Qa’im), the Well-guided (al-Mahdi),
the Leader, the Awaited, the Pleased,
the descendant of the Infallible Imams,
the Successor, the son of the Pleased Successors (of the Prophets),
the Guide, the Immaculate,
and the son of the Imams—the guides and immaculate.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُعِزَّ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٱلْمُسْتَضْعَفِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O grantor of dignity to the oppressed and faithful ones.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُذِلَّ ٱلْكَافِرِينَ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya mudhilla alkafirina almutakabbirina alzzalimina
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O humiliator of the arrogant and oppressing unbelievers.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ يَا صَاحِبَ ٱلزَّمَانِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya mawlaya ya sahiba alzzamani
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O my master, the Patron of the Age.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ امِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Believers.

segments.arabic: السّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the Luminous
and the Doyenne of the women of the world.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلائِمَّةِ ٱلْحُجَجِ ٱلْمَعْصُومِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the Imams—the arguments (of Allah) and Immaculate
and the leader of all creatures.
Peace be upon you, O my master
addressed by him who is loyal to your (divinely commissioned) leadership.

segments.arabic: اشْهَدُ انَّكَ ٱلإِمَامُ ٱلْمَهْدِيُّ قَوْلاً وَفِعْلاً
segments.transliteration: ash-hadu annaka al-imamu almahdiyyu qawlan wa fi`lan
segments.translation: I bear witness that you are the well-guided Imam in word and deed,

segments.arabic: وَانْتَ ٱلَّذِي تَمْلَا ٱلارْضَ قِسْطاً وَعَدْلاً
segments.transliteration: wa anta alladhi tamla'u al-arda qistan wa `adlan
segments.translation: it is you who shall fill the earth with justice and impartiality
after it will be filled with wrong and partiality.
So, may Allah hasten your reappearance,
make easy your advent,
make nearer the time of your coming,
increase the number of your supporters and backers,
and fulfill for you all that which He has promised you.
He is surely the most truthful of all those who can speak (and He has said):

segments.arabic: (وَنُرِيدُ انْ نَمُنَّ عَلَىٰ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسْتُضْعِفُوا فِي ٱلارْضِ
segments.transliteration: wa nuridu an namunna `ala alladhina istud`ifu fi al-ardi
segments.translation: “We desired to bestow a favor upon those who were deemed weak in the land,

segments.transliteration: wa naj`alahum a'immatan wa naj`alahumu alwarithina
segments.translation: make them the Imams, and make them the heirs.”
O my master! O Patron of the Age!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
My request is...
Mention your need and then go on saying:
So, intercede for me so that it will be settled,

segments.arabic: لِعِلْمِي انَّ لَكَ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ شَفَاعَةً مَقْبُولَةً
segments.transliteration: li`ilmi anna laka `inda allahi shafa`atan maqbulatan
segments.translation: for I am turning my face towards you for settling my request,
since I know for sure that you enjoy with Allah admissible word of intercession,
and praiseworthy standing.
So, I ask you in the name of Him Who granted you (i.e. the Ahl al-Bayt) exclusively the right of representing Him,

segments.arabic: وَبِٱلشَّانِ ٱلَّذِي لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa bilshsha'ni alladhi lakum `inda allahi baynakum wa baynahu
segments.translation: and admitted you all to keep His secrets,

segments.arabic: سَلِ ٱللَّهَ تَعَالَىٰ فِي نُجْحِ طَلِبَتِي
segments.transliteration: sal(i) allaha ta`ala fi nujhi talibati
segments.translation: and I ask you in the name of the standing that you exclusively enjoy with Allah,
to ask Allah, the Exalted, to render successful my request,
to answer my prayer,

segments.transliteration: You may then ask for whatever you want, and it will be settled for you, by Allah’s permission.
segments.translation: and to relieve my grief.

duas.title: Isteghasa (seeking aid) as recommended by Ayatullah Taqi Behjat
duas.description:
Before the dua, offer 2 Rakat Salat with Al Hamd & Sura Fath in first & Al Hamd and Sura Ikhlass in second.
In Qunoot recite Dua Faraj (Allahumma Kulle Waliyekal...)
Then recite Allhumma Asaloka be maqami indak..
Then Recite Tasbih Zehra (sa)
Do Tawassul to Imam ajtfs
duas.arabic:
يَا وَصِيَّ ٱلْحَسَنِ


وَٱلْخَلَفُ ٱلْحُجَّةُ


أَيُّهَا ٱلْقَائِمُ ٱلْمُنْتَظَرُ ٱلْمَهْدِيُّ


يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ


يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَىٰ خَلْقِهِ


يَا سَيِّدَنَا وَمَوْلاَنَا


إِنَّا تَوَجَّهْنَا وَٱسْتَشْفَعْنَا


وَتَوَسَّلْنَا بِكَ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ


وَقَدَّمْنَاكَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْ حَاجَاتِنَا


يَا وَجِيهاً عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ


إِشْفَعْ لَنَا عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ
duas.transliteration:
ya wasiyya alhasani


walkhalafu alhujjatu


ayyuha alqa'imu almuntazaru almahdiyyu


yabna rasuli allahi


ya hujjata allahi `ala khalqihi


ya sayyidana wa mawlana


inna tawajjahana wastashfa`na


wa tawassalna bika ila allahi


wa qaddamnaka bayna yaday hajatina


ya wajihan `inda allahi


ishfa` lana `inda allahi
duas.translation:
O successor of al-Hasan!


O descendant [of the Infallibles] and Argument [of Allah]!


O Riser, Awaited, and Well-guided!


O son of Allah’s Messenger!


O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!


O our master and chief!


we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession


and your advocacy for us before Allah;


and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.


O well-esteemed with Allah,


intercede for us before Allah.

segments.translation: O successor of al-Hasan!
O descendant [of the Infallibles] and Argument [of Allah]!
O Riser, Awaited, and Well-guided!
O son of Allah’s Messenger!
O Allah’s Argument against His creatures!
O our master and chief!
we are turning our faces toward you, seeking your intercession
and your advocacy for us before Allah;
and we are presenting you [as our intermediary] for the settlement of our needs.
O well-esteemed with Allah,
intercede for us before Allah.

duas.reference: Note: In case of a important need it can be done for 14 days or 40 days
